definition: Stock-based compensation creates ~$75-80B annual Mag-7 earnings quality distortion through an SBC-restructuring-buyback triangle that is multiplicative, making true FCF-to-equity approximately 60-70% of reported non-GAAP FCF, with reverse reflexive amplification potential of 1.5-2.0x on drawdowns.
evidence: True FCF-to-equity ~60-70% of reported non-GAAP FCF
25% Mag-7 decline mechanically increases SBC cost by $15-25B, compressing non-GAAP margins 100-200bp
Meta 2022 partial validation: SBC/revenue rose from ~18% to 25%+
Quality factor contamination: 100-200bp (30-40% of measured QMJ premium) is SBC artifact
open_questions: Whether SBC expense acceleration during drawdowns could trigger a reflexive spiral
Degree to which investors have already adjusted for SBC distortion
